tools.name: search_semantic_scholar_papers
tools.description: Search Semantic Scholar for papers, related works, and citation context for a scientific topic.

query.description: Scientific query, topic, or paper title.

limit.description: Maximum number of papers to return.

tools.name: get_semantic_scholar_citation_graph
tools.description: Retrieve citation relationships and influential references for a paper.

paper_id.description: Semantic Scholar paper identifier or DOI.

tools.name: get_semantic_scholar_author_profile
tools.description: Retrieve author profile details and influential work metadata.
